use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and settings panels
Showing placeholder avatars when user images fail to load or are unavailable
Representing entities or team members in member lists and grids
Displaying user avatars in comment sections, chat interfaces, or activity feeds
Indicating user identity and presence in dashboards or admin interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile user avatar component with customizable color variants (brand, neutral, error, success, warning) and size options (x-small to x-large). Supports both image and text/emoji display with optional square styling. Built with Tailwind CSS for consistent user representation across various applications including SaaS platforms, e-commerce dashboards, and social interfaces.
